---
title: "My First Quarto Blog Post"
date: "2026-01-31"
permalink: /posts/2026/01/quarto-post/
tags:
  - quarto
  - jekyll
  - blog
jupyter: defor39
execute:
  echo: true
  output: true
---

This is my first blog post written in Quarto!

## Quarto Features

Quarto is a great tool for scientific and technical publishing.

```{python}
print("Hello, Quarto!")
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-sine
#| fig-cap: "Sine wave generated with Matplotlib"

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

x = np.linspace(0, 2 * np.pi, 200)
y = np.sin(x)

plt.figure()
plt.plot(x, y)
plt.xlabel("x")
plt.ylabel("sin(x)")
plt.title("Sine Wave")

plt.savefig("fig-sine.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.close()
```
